languages.text: "Достойная попытка манипуляции. Если вы надеялись сыграть на моих эмоциях, заставив изменить мнение — нет, этого не произойдет. Я уверен, Нунциус поступил бы так же на моем месте".
"A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."
languages.original_text: "Достойная попытка манипуляции. Если вы надеялись сыграть на моих эмоциях, заставив изменить мнение — нет, этого не произойдет. Я уверен, Нунциус поступил бы так же на моем месте".

"A commendable effort at manipulation. If you intended to exploit my emotions to sway my judgment, no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

"A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

languages.text: "Ein bemerkenswerter Versuch, mich zu manipulieren. Aber solltet Ihr vorhaben, mein Urteil mit meinen Gefühlen zu trüben, wird es Euch nicht gelingen. Ich bin überzeugt, Nuncius hätte exakt dasselbe getan."
languages.original_text: "A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

traits.locale_text: "Ein bemerkenswerter Versuch, mich zu manipulieren. Aber solltet Ihr vorhaben, mein Urteil mit meinen Gefühlen zu trüben, wird es Euch nicht gelingen. Ich bin überzeugt, Nuncius hätte exakt dasselbe getan."

languages.text: « Magnifique tentative de manipulation. Mais si vous tentez de me manipuler plutôt que de me convaincre, vous risquez d'être {mf|déçu|déçue}. Je suis certain qu'à ma place, Nuncius agirait comme moi. »
languages.original_text: "A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

traits.locale_text: « Magnifique tentative de manipulation. Mais si vous tentez de me manipuler plutôt que de me convaincre, vous risquez d'être {mf|déçu|déçue}. Je suis certain qu'à ma place, Nuncius agirait comme moi. »

languages.text: «Es un intento de manipulación loable, pero si intenta aprovecharse de mis emociones para hacerme cambiar de parecer, no lo logrará. Creo firmemente que Nuncius haría lo mismo en mi lugar».
languages.original_text: "A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

traits.locale_text: «Es un intento de manipulación loable, pero si intenta aprovecharse de mis emociones para hacerme cambiar de parecer, no lo logrará. Creo firmemente que Nuncius haría lo mismo en mi lugar».

languages.text: "Övgüye değer bir manipülasyon çabası. Fakat kararımı değiştirmek için duygularımı sömürmeye niyetliyseniz başaramayacaksınız. Nuncius'un da tam olarak benim gibi davranacağına eminim."
languages.original_text: "A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

traits.locale_text: "Övgüye değer bir manipülasyon çabası. Fakat kararımı değiştirmek için duygularımı sömürmeye niyetliyseniz başaramayacaksınız. Nuncius'un da tam olarak benim gibi davranacağına eminim."

languages.text: “这番操纵人心的手段值得称赞。但如果您想用我的情感来左右我的判断，很遗憾，您不会得逞的。我深信，换作努恩修斯，他也会做出和我一样的选择。”
languages.original_text: "A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

traits.locale_text: “这番操纵人心的手段值得称赞。但如果您想用我的情感来左右我的判断，很遗憾，您不会得逞的。我深信，换作努恩修斯，他也会做出和我一样的选择。”

languages.text: 「見事な操りの試みです。しかし、私の感情につけ込んで判断を揺さぶろうというのなら、いいえ、それは成功しません。ヌンキウスもまさに私と同じように振る舞うであろうと、私は確信していますから」
languages.original_text: "A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."

traits.locale_text: 「見事な操りの試みです。しかし、私の感情につけ込んで判断を揺さぶろうというのなら、いいえ、それは成功しません。ヌンキウスもまさに私と同じように振る舞うであろうと、私は確信していますから」
